title: Sajtmaskin prompt heuristic tokens
description: Editor validate-on-save contract for config/prompt-heuristic-tokens.json. The runtime authority is src/lib/builder/prompt-heuristics.ts, which reads the design/scope/requirements/sections/styles token lists; other categories (structure, content) are consumed elsewhere. Each category is { description, tokens }. This schema only guards the backoffice editor; it does not run at runtime.

description.description: Human-readable note shown in the backoffice editor expander.

tokens.description: Lowercase match tokens for this category. May be empty; the backoffice editor trims blanks on save.
